metadata.subject: A patchwork elephant walking through a lush jungle, its body made of colourful fabric pieces, surrounded by oversized tropical leaves and friendly jungle animals peeking through the foliage

painting_plan.subject: A patchwork elephant walking through a lush jungle
painting_plan.expanded_subject: A whimsical patchwork elephant with a body stitched from colourful fabric pieces walks through a lush, vibrant jungle. Oversized tropical leaves frame the scene, and friendly jungle animals peek playfully through the foliage, creating a warm, storybook atmosphere.

layers.name: Jungle sky and background wash
layers.description: Fill the canvas with a soft gradient sky peeking through the jungle canopy in the upper third, and a warm earthy forest floor across the bottom third. Middle band suggests distant, hazy greenery.
layers.techniques: broad sweeping horizontal strokes, soft blended washes, gentle gradient from warm cream sky to mossy green
layers.highlights: warm golden glow near the top-center suggesting sunlight filtering through leaves

layers.name: Background foliage silhouettes
layers.description: Paint soft, rounded silhouettes of distant jungle plants, palm fronds, and ferns across the mid-ground. Keep shapes simple and slightly blurry to suggest depth.
layers.techniques: layered soft shapes, loose painterly edges, gentle overlapping silhouettes
layers.shapes: rounded leaf clumps, arching fronds, soft bushes
layers.highlights: subtle lighter green edges where imaginary sunlight grazes the tops of distant foliage

layers.name: Oversized tropical leaves framing the scene
layers.description: Add large, bold tropical leaves (monstera, banana, palm) on the left, right, and top corners of the canvas, framing the composition like a proscenium around the elephant's space.
layers.techniques: confident outlined shapes with flat fills, stylized leaf veins drawn with clean lines, slight overlap for layering
layers.shapes: large split monstera leaves, long banana leaves, fanning palm fronds
layers.highlights: lighter green highlights along leaf centers and tips; darker shadow tones tucked under overlapping leaves

layers.name: Patchwork elephant body
layers.description: Paint the main elephant centered slightly left of canvas, mid-stride, facing right. Build its body from a grid of colourful fabric patches — squares, diamonds, triangles — each with a different pattern feel. Include trunk curling upward playfully.
layers.techniques: blocky patchwork fills outlined with visible 'stitched' dashed lines, playful mismatched colours, soft rounded body silhouette
layers.shapes: rounded elephant body, stumpy legs, curling trunk, floppy ears made of contrasting patches
layers.highlights: tiny white stitch marks along patch seams, a soft blush on the cheek, a sparkle in the eye

layers.name: Peeking jungle animal friends
layers.description: Tuck small friendly animals peeking through the foliage: a parrot in the upper right leaves, a monkey hanging upper left, a tiger cub or frog at the lower right behind a leaf, and a small bird near the elephant's trunk.
layers.techniques: cute simplified character shapes, large round eyes, soft outlines, partial reveals behind leaves
layers.shapes: round heads, simple body shapes, peeking eyes and paws
layers.highlights: bright white eye highlights, colourful feather/fur accents, rosy cheeks for charm

layers.name: Details, textures, and final sparkle
layers.description: Add final storybook details: stitch lines on the elephant, leaf veins, small flowers and dots on the jungle floor, tiny fireflies or pollen specks in the air, and soft shadow under the elephant.
layers.techniques: fine detailing, stippling for pollen and flowers, dashed stitches, subtle shadow glazes
layers.shapes: dashes, dots, tiny stars, small petals, soft shadow ellipse
layers.highlights: warm glowing specks of light in the air, bright white stitches, gentle rim light on leaves and elephant's back to unify the scene

painting_plan.overall_notes: Keep the mood warm, whimsical, and inviting — a cozy storybook feel. Use confident outlines, flat but layered colour, and playful imperfection. Maintain a clear focal hierarchy: the patchwork elephant is the hero, framed by oversized leaves, with animal friends as delightful secondary discoveries. Avoid realism; embrace charm, pattern, and tactile 'handmade' texture throughout.
